title: Resolve Rust RPL acceptance blockers
description: Fix recoverable DAD1/DRX2 provisioning, jittered destination-aware DIS and DIO suppression, authenticated unicast DIO/DIS destination enforcement, managed prefix reappearance, and final regression gates without committing.
